title: Motley's Music Discs
description: Adding 8bit- and Chiptune-style music discs to Minecraft!
body:
Motley's Music Discs is a mod for Minecraft that adds dozens of classic (and modern!) songs to the game in the form of music discs in a retro-style. Each track was custom-produced by various musicians (full credits in mod description) and given a unique texture to match the theme/vibe of the song.

Nearly every disc this mod adds can be found in a loot chest, and **all of the discs can be obtained through the vanilla method of getting a skeleton to shoot a creeper to death**.

More discs and full loot tables are being worked on!

Obligatory: This mod is a work in progress. Please report any bugs or issues you might find to Github.

-----

This mod is developed for Fabric.
There are no plans to develop a Forge version.

MUSIC CREDITS:

Disphing - YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/@disphing)  
Koopastar - YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/@Koopastar_)  
8bitUniverse - YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/@8BitUniverse)  

Thank you so much to all of the amazing musicians who gave me permission to code their songs into this mod. Please go show them some love!
